calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Williams appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that it was represented by Mr. Williams that his Mother was Mr. Singleton's (Decedent) surviving spouse but that the documents filed indicate that the marriage was from 1952 to 1980. Mr. Williams stated that his Mother has dementia, that she drafted the letter to help him out with legal matters, that he could not find a divorce decree and that he went under assumption that they were still married. Mr. Williams also stated that there were times of separation, that the Decedent was addressed in the marriage as Mr. Singleton, that the checks for $10,000.00 were at the Mother's direction, that the two daughters were deceased and that neither of them had any children. The Petition to Terminate Estate was continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will have the Probate Examiner contact Mr. Williams to give some guidance on proper documents.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Williams (Petitioner) appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Williams stated that he spoke with legal counsel in Georgia, that Edna Singleton (Wife of Decedent/Mother of Petitioner) was the sole heir, that Edwina and Sylvia (deceased siblings) had no children, and that there was $111,010.09 in the Ameriprise account which he gave to Ms. Singleton. Mr. Williams also stated that he has power of attorney for his Mother, that his mother has a medical condition, that the funds were distributed to Ms. Singleton under her instruction, that there was a bank account where the funds were deposited which is now closed and that he has the bank account records. The Petition to Terminate Estate was continued to April 15, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will contact Mr. Williams with regard to what records may be required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Kenneth Williams (Administrator in Propria Persona) to appear by Court Call (telephone) on September 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and to file a Petition to Terminate the Estate for Lack of Assets or file an inventory of the assets. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)
